query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "danceopd: on-policy generative field distillation" computer science
rationale: This paper qualifies under category (d) as a foundational methodology reference for knowledge distillation, a core component of the user's query regarding "Generative Field Distillation," and under category (a) as it measures the same mechanism of transferring knowledge from a teacher to a student model, even though it focuses on image classification rather than the specific on-policy generative field context.
